name: codex-web-assistant
description: Browser extension plus TypeScript local bridge for running local Codex tools on the current web page.

scripts.check: node -e "import('./local-codex-bridge/server.ts')" && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/popup.js && node --check extension/debug.js && sh -n scripts/check.sh && sh -n scripts/start.sh && sh -n scripts/stop.sh && sh -n scripts/daemon.sh && sh -n scripts/autostart.sh && node --test test/*.test.ts
